_meta.description: EXPERIMENTAL dish profiles — uses soy_condiment as primary_tag (more specific than soy_based) and adds pickled tag to hosomaki for tsukemono conflict detection.

dishes.notes: EXPERIMENTAL: primary_tag changed from soy_based to soy_condiment. Keeps soy_based in food_tags so existing aromatic-white-umami rule still fires. No pickled tag — kampyo is sweet-savory, not acidic-fermented.

EXPERIMENTAL: primary_tag soy_condiment; pickled tag added for tsukemono (nabo em pickle). This triggers conflict-sweetness-pickled for off-dry/semi-sweet wines, penalising Lezíria Meio Seco and Soalheiro 9%.
